nasb.text: When the priests came forth from the holy place (for all the priests who were present had sanctified themselves, without regard to divisions),

esv.text: And when the priests came out of the Holy Place (for all the priests who were present had consecrated themselves, without regard to their divisions,

cnv.text: 眾祭司從聖所裡出來的時候，

ccb.text: 随后，祭司退出圣所，所有在场的祭司不分班次都已洁净自己。
